description: Error categories emitted by kraken-cli. Agents should route on the error field, not message strings.

fields.error: Error category string (matches a category below)
fields.message: Human-readable error detail (not stable, do not parse)

extended_fields.suggestion: Actionable guidance: tier limits, per-endpoint costs, recommended alternatives
extended_fields.retryable: Boolean indicating the agent may retry after adjusting behavior
extended_fields.docs_url: Link to the relevant Kraken rate limit documentation page

example_rate_limit.message: Spot REST API rate limit exceeded (EAPI:Rate limit exceeded).

categories.description: Kraken API returned an application-level error (insufficient funds, unknown pair, order minimum not met).
categories.agent_action: Log the error. Fix request parameters. Do not retry the same request.

categories.description: Authentication failed. API key invalid, expired, or lacks permissions.
Network-level failure. Request could not reach the Kraken API.
categories.agent_action: Retry with exponential backoff. Check connectivity.

categories.description: Throttled by Kraken's server-side rate limiter. The CLI returns this error immediately with no internal retry. The error includes a suggestion field with specific guidance and a docs_url linking to the relevant Kraken documentation.
categories.agent_action: Read the suggestion field for tier-specific limits and recommended changes. Read docs_url for full documentation. Decide whether to retry, reduce request frequency, or switch to WebSocket streaming.

backoff_strategy.note: CLI does not retry rate limit errors. The agent decides retry timing based on the suggestion and docs_url fields.

common_causes: Short-lived orders triggering trading engine penalty

example_envelope.message: Spot REST API rate limit exceeded (EAPI:Rate limit exceeded).
example_envelope.suggestion: Wait 5-15 seconds before retrying. Reduce request frequency. Use WebSocket streaming instead of REST polling for real-time data.

categories.description: Input validation failed before the request was sent.
categories.agent_action: Fix input parameters. Check types, required fields, allowed values.

example_envelope.message: Validation error: Invalid URL: invalid authority

categories.description: Configuration error. Config file missing, malformed, or invalid.
categories.agent_action: Check config file. For agents, prefer environment variables.
Reconnect with backoff. CLI retries up to 12 times per stream lifecycle with paced exponential backoff and reconnect safety budgeting.

categories.description: Failed to parse API response. Response not valid JSON or unexpected structure.
categories.agent_action: Log raw response. Possible API change or maintenance. Do not retry.

example_envelope.message: Parse error: expected value at line 1 column 1
